title: Tabua's Default
description: Crystal PvP Pack is a clean and optimized texture pack designed for fast-paced End Crystal combat. It improves visibility, reduces visual clutter, and helps players react faster during intense PvP fights.
body:
🌈 Enhanced Visual Effects

Beautiful sky improvements, including dynamic lighting and atmospheric details

Vibrant colors and improved environmental depth

Subtle visual polish that keeps the vanilla feel intact

⚔️ Upgraded Gear & Items

Refined armor textures with a bold, clean style

Improved item clarity for better visibility in combat

Enhanced Netherite and special items with a more powerful look

🍎 Immersive Details

Polished food and consumable textures

Clean GUI elements for a smoother gameplay experience

Carefully balanced colors that stay true to Minecraft’s original design

🚀 Performance Friendly
Optimized for high FPS and smooth gameplay — perfect for PvP, survival, and creative worlds alike.
